metadata.title:
new ORDINANCE PLANNED


FOR WATER MAINS

pages.raw_text:
Councilman N. s. Pratt has
plan to do away with the difficulties
arising from the adoption of the
amendment to the city charter pro-
viding for the laying of water
mains by petition the same as 9TH
err public improvements are made.
1t has been almost impossible to
do any work under the charter
amendment and only work author
lied under the old arrangement
whereby the property owners guar
anteed the revenue to the city has
been attempted.


Many people have laid private
mains and refuse to be taxed twice
for the same thing. They will sue
the city rather than pay second
time for water. This has had the
effect of practically trying up water
extensions and has made impera-
tive some method Of extending
mains that will be on a more eQuit-
able basis.
